name: Buffalo Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 4 lb Chicken wings; cut into thirds, discard tips
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle fresh pepper and salt on the chicken wings.
2. Heat the oil to 400°F. Add the chicken wings and cook until they're golden and crisp, stirring occasionally.
3. When done, remove them to drain on paper towels.
4. Cook the remaining wings as above.
5. Melt the butter, add the hot sauce and vinegar. Stir well.
6. Remove from the flame immediately.
7. Place the chicken on a warm serving platter, pour the sauce on top and serve.
8. Serve with Blue Cheese Dressing and celery.
